languageRestartDescription: FindEat needs to restart to change the language and layout direction.
editPostHint: Change text or remove review dishes
archivePostHint: Hide it without losing likes or comments
archivePostDescription: It will be hidden from feeds and profiles. You can restore it anytime from Settings.
postArchiveError: Could not archive the post. Please try again.
editContentHint: Only the caption can be changed. The photo and tagged place stay the same.
editReviewHint: Change existing text or remove dishes. The cover, ratings, and restaurant cannot be changed.
caption: Caption
editPostError: Could not update the post. Please try again.
deletePostDescription: This cannot be undone. The post, its likes, and its comments will be permanently removed.
postRemoveError: Could not remove the post. Please try again.
reportPostHint: Tell us if this post breaks the community guidelines
reportSubtitle: Your report is private. The account will not know who reported it.
reportError: Could not submit the report. Please try again.
reportReceivedHint: Thank you. Our moderation team will review it.
blockAfterReportDescription: They will not be able to find your profile, contact you, or interact with your posts. You can unblock them later in Settings.
blockAfterReportError: The report was submitted, but the user could not be blocked. Please try again.
reviewTeaserTitle: There’s a full review behind this moment
contentTeaserTitle_one: See the moment behind this review
contentTeaserTitle_other: Explore {{count}} more moments from this visit
manageConnectionsOptionHint: Connect this post to a review or quick post
manageConnectionsHint: Connect posts from the same restaurant experience so people can move between the visual story and your written review.
connectionsUpdateError: Could not update the connection. Please try again.
noPostsToConnectHint: Create a review and a quick post about the same restaurant, then connect them here.
